g.text: Train loss and held-out response loss over 7500 steps - smol-smoltalk + tulu-3-personas, from Esme-214M-Base

text.tspan: Conclusion: held-out response loss bottoms at 1.36 on step 6300 and rises afterwards;
early stopping restores that checkpoint, not the final step.
